opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This rough patch on my bald head suddenly got very sore yesterday, and when I touched it this evening it started bleeding and it feels burning hot. I'm really worried it could be something bad.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It suddenly started bleeding this evening and I got scared, especially because I'm on a blood thinner.

symptom_narrative.onset: it got sore yesterday, and it started bleeding this evening when I brushed it
symptom_narrative.duration: the soreness has been about a day
symptom_narrative.character: sore, burning and hot, and it bled a little
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: sore and a bit frightening, but I can cope with it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on the bald part of my scalp, on the left side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on suddenly over the last day or so
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: it settled a bit after I pressed on it with a tissue
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: touching or brushing against it, and it bled again this evening
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever, I don't feel unwell in myself otherwise
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the rough patches have been there for a long time but they've never hurt or bled like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: it's mainly the worry - it hasn't really stopped me doing things

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: lots of sun damage over the years - rough dry spots on my scalp, face and the backs of my hands

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a blood thinner (I think it's called apixaban) for my irregular heartbeat

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: fair skin, spent a lot of time outdoors over the years and sunburns easily

objective_data_offered.value: a rough, scaly patch on the bald part of my scalp, about the size of a small coin, with a little dried blood crust in the middle
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen only over video at the patient's angle and lighting; the base and texture cannot be felt remotely

objective_data_offered.value: several other rough, dry, scaly patches on my scalp, face and the backs of my hands
my wife says the spot looked a bit red and sore around the edge, but there's no pus and it isn't spreading
